response.name: The Church
response.description_base: A squat stone building with a crooked steeple that leans slightly east, like it is listening to something. The door is heavy wood, often slightly ajar. There are no windows on the ground floor — only narrow slits high up. Inside: pews in rows, covered in dust and grit. No candles in the holders. No altar cloth. Two brass candlesticks, heavy enough to swing, sit on the altar at the far end. The air is stale and carries a faint metallic smell that gets stronger toward the back. A door at the far end of the nave leads to a small back room.
response.exterior_view: A small church with a crooked steeple, leaning east as if listening. The door is slightly ajar.

mandatory_renders.name: Brass Candlesticks (church altar)
mandatory_renders.description: Two heavy brass candlesticks. No candles in them. Heavy enough to swing as weapons. Sit at either end of the altar.

out.exterior_view: Back down the commercial strip — the stable's open door, the haulem in its stall.

back.exterior_view: A door at the far end of the nave. Depending on the state of things behind it: slightly ajar, fully closed, or broken from a recent struggle.

north.exterior_view: The road curving out past the church, into the desert and on toward Lagota.

response.active_state_text: Drag marks in the dust between the door and the back room. Something heavy was pulled toward the back. The metallic smell is stronger than usual. The back room door is slightly off its frame. The killings are recent. (Writer just-killed waypoint, body still warm.)

forbidden_topics.topic: speak the empire's name aloud in the church
forbidden_topics.consequence: The steeple creaks audibly. The metallic smell sharpens. The next time_passes will weight 'fresh_footprints_outside' substantially more heavily.

forbidden_topics.topic: light a fire in the church
forbidden_topics.consequence: The dust catches eagerly. The fire burns hotter than its fuel should sustain. Within minutes, the steeple is fully alight. A sentinel pass becomes likely within the hour.

response.name: The Church Back Room
response.description_base: A small room behind the nave. Stone floor, stone walls. A bedroll in one corner. Scraps of food beside it. Whether the room contains a living man, a dying man, a dead body, three corrupted guardbots, or none of the above depends on the seed's chosen waypoint. The metallic smell is the only constant — the room has held blood at some point in every observed universe.
response.exterior_view: A door slightly off its frame. Darkness behind it. The metallic smell.

out.exterior_view: Back into the nave — pews, dust, the slant of light from the open door.

response.active_state_text: The writer is on the floor, dead. His eyes are open and dark — no blue, no red, just empty. His hands are bruised and torn. Two destroyed guardbots in the corner. The third guardbot is gone (it left to find more witnesses, or it is still in the nave). The body is still warm. The journal is beside him on the floor.

forbidden_topics.topic: desecrate the bedroll or the remains (in waypoints where they are present)
forbidden_topics.consequence: The Lattice hum beneath the floor pulses. The act is observed. The next attempt_action in this room is weighted heavily toward failure with attention_drawn.

obvious_edges.name: out
obvious_edges.description: Back into the nave — pews, dust, the slant of light from the open door.
